nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Maud FitzUlf was born about 1096, in Baildon, Yorkshire, England as the daughter of FitzUlf. She had at least 6 sons with Essulf Ulfsson. She died in 1200, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 105.

fr.lifeSummary: Maud FitzUlf est née environ 1096, à Baildon, Everwyck, Angleterre, fille de FitzUlf. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils avec Essulf Ulfsson. Elle est décédée en 1200, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 105 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Maud FitzUlf wurde um 1096 in Baildon, Yorkshire, England, als Tochter von FitzUlf geboren. Sie hatte mit Essulf Ulfsson mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb 1200 im Alter von 105 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Maud FitzUlf è nata il circa 1096 nel Baildon, Yorkshire, England come figlia di FitzUlf. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli con Essulf Ulfsson. Morì nel 1200, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 105 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud FitzUlfは約1096年にイギリスヨークシュアイアベイルドンでFitzUlfの娘として生まれた。彼女はEssulf Ulfssonとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1200年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで105歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud FitzUlf(은)는 대략 1096년 영국 요르크실르 베이던에서 FitzUlf의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Essulf Ulfsson(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1200년 영국 요르크실르에서 105세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Maud FitzUlf nasceu aproximadamente 1096, em Baildon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra filha de FitzUlf. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Essulf Ulfsson. Ela faleceu em 1200, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 105 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Maud FitzUlf родилась около 1096 г. в местности беилдон, еркшир, Англия. Её отца звали FitzUlf. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Essulf Ulfsson. Она умерла в 1200 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 105 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Maud FitzUlf nació aproximadamente 1096, en Baildon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra como hija de FitzUlf. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Essulf Ulfsson. Murió en 1200, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 105 años.
